sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96675" key="stefhplo/kos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στεφη-πλόκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n96675.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">στεφανηπλόκος</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.41e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
